mapper.sql: SELECT esl.id, esl.hot_deal_id, esl.user_id, NVL(u.name, esl.recipient_email) AS recipient_name, esl.recipient_email, NVL(hd.title, '-') AS hot_deal_title, esl.title AS subject, esl.content, CASE WHEN esl.status = 'NEEDS_REVIEW' THEN 'FAIL' WHEN esl.status IN ('APPROVED', 'PUBLISHING', 'PUBLISHED', 'SENDING', 'SENT', 'RETRYING') THEN 'PASS' ELSE 'PENDING' END AS validation_status, CASE WHEN esl.status = 'NEEDS_REVIEW' THEN esl.failure_reason ELSE NULL END AS validation_reason, esl.status AS send_status, CASE WHEN esl.status = 'APPROVED' THEN 'READY' WHEN esl.status = 'PUBLISHING' THEN 'PUBLISHED' WHEN esl.status = 'PUBLISHED' THEN 'PUBLISHED' WHEN esl.status = 'SENDING' THEN 'SENDING' WHEN esl.status = 'SENT' THEN 'SENT' WHEN esl.status = 'RETRYING' THEN 'RETRYING' WHEN esl.status = 'FAILED' THEN 'FAILED' ELSE 'PENDING' END AS publish_status, CASE WHEN esl.status = 'FAILED' THEN esl.failure_reason ELSE NULL END AS publish_error_message, CASE WHEN esl.status IN ('PUBLISHING', 'PUBLISHED', 'SENDING', 'SENT', 'RETRYING') THEN esl.updated_at ELSE NULL END AS published_at, hd.created_at AS hot_deal_created_at, esl.created_at, esl.updated_at FROM email_send_logs esl LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = esl.user_id LEFT JOIN hot_deals hd ON hd.id = esl.hot_deal_id
mapper.select: ORDER BY esl.created_at DESC, esl.id DESC
WHERE esl.status = 'NEEDS_REVIEW' ORDER BY esl.created_at DESC, esl.id DESC
WHERE esl.status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY esl.created_at ASC, esl.id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE email_send_logs SET title = #{subject}, content = #{content}, status = 'APPROVED', failure_reason = NULL, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'NEEDS_REVIEW'
UPDATE email_send_logs SET status = #{status}, failure_reason = #{failureReason}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
